title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Veolia Environmental Services (AU) Pty Ltd
body: "Application number 4833  Applicant Veolia Environnement S.A. objected to the name used by Veolia Environmental Services (AU) Pty Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 19 November 2024 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Veolia Environmental Services (AU) Pty Ltd is changed to 15228737, Ltd. "
